title: Mental Health Quiz
description: A non-diagnostic screening quiz that routes users to support resources.

overrides.reason: Suicidal ideation with plan requires immediate crisis routing.
Recurring suicidal ideation triggers high-risk routing at minimum.

questions.prompt: Over the past two weeks, how would you describe your overall mood?

options.label: I feel good more days than not
I feel okay, but flat or numb some days
I feel down or empty most days
I feel hopeless or dark almost all the time

questions.prompt: How have your sleep patterns been lately?

options.label: I sleep pretty well and wake up rested
I have some nights of bad sleep, but it evens out
I'm sleeping way less than usual or oversleeping most days
My sleep is completely disrupted

questions.prompt: How stressed or overwhelmed do you feel about your daily life right now?

options.label: I'm managing my stress okay
I feel stressed, but I can usually handle it
I feel overwhelmed a lot and struggling to cope
I feel completely overwhelmed and can barely function

questions.prompt: How connected do you feel to the people in your life?

options.label: I have people I can talk to and I feel supported
I have some close people, but sometimes feel lonely
I feel pretty isolated and disconnected from others
I feel completely alone

questions.prompt: In the past two weeks, have you had thoughts about hurting yourself or that you'd be better off dead?

options.label: No, not at all
I've had a fleeting thought, but it didn't stick
I've had these thoughts regularly and they're hard to shake
I think about it constantly and have a plan

questions.prompt: How have you been using alcohol, drugs, or other substances to cope?

options.label: I don't use them, or I use them rarely and socially
I use them occasionally to unwind
I'm using more than usual to numb or escape
I'm dependent on substances to get through the day

questions.prompt: How are you functioning at work, school, or with daily responsibilities?

options.label: I'm managing well and keeping up
I'm keeping up, but it takes more effort than usual
I'm falling behind or avoiding responsibilities
I've basically stopped doing what I need to do

questions.prompt: Have you been withdrawing from activities or people you normally enjoy?

options.label: I'm doing things I enjoy and seeing people
I'm doing less than usual, but still getting out sometimes
I've withdrawn quite a bit from activities and people
I don't want to see anyone or do anything

questions.prompt: How's your energy and motivation been?

options.label: I have decent energy and feel motivated most days
Some days I'm tired, but I push through okay
I feel exhausted a lot, even after rest
I have no energy or motivation

questions.prompt: When you think about the future, how do you feel?

options.label: I feel hopeful or at least accepting about what's ahead
I have some worry about the future, but mostly feel okay
I feel uncertain or pessimistic about the future
I feel hopeless and don't believe things will get better
